title: The Ass & The Enemy
content:
"Get up! let us flee from the Foe,"
    Said the Man: but the Ass said, "Why so?"
    "Will they double my load,
    Or my blows? Then, by goad,
    And by stirrup, I've no cause to go."

    Your Reasons Are Not Mine
meaning:
Walter Crane's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "The Ass & The Enemy"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
